name: cowork
description: Cowork branch + session-handoff workflow for Pnimit Mega (InternalMedicine): questions.json, flashcards.json, notes.json, drugs.json, plus src/**/*.js modules. Tandem-session safety via /cowork:claim and /cowork:collisions. v0.2.0 adds Pnimit-tuned distractor-autopsy + schema-guard agents and topic-coverage + hebrew-sweep commands. Ported from the Geriatrics cowork plugin.
